# openapi-spec Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [OpenApiSpec Domain — openapi-spec Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/openapi-spec/domain-openapispec.html): The core architectural domain defining the API contract, endpoints, and data schemas for the Supermodel service. Architectural overview of the OpenApiSpec domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [ProjectManifest Domain — openapi-spec Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/openapi-spec/domain-projectmanifest.html): Handles the package ecosystem and distribution configuration for the specification tools. Architectural overview of the ProjectManifest domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [package.json — openapi-spec Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/openapi-spec/file-package-json.html): Architecture documentation for package.json, a json file in the openapi-spec codebase.
